section: I have noticed some problems with our meeting rooms. I think we should fix the air conditioner first because the room can become uncomfortable during meetings.
if the room is too hot or too cold
question: it may be difficult to invite clients there.

id: → I have noticed / I haven't noticed
今回は air conditioner の問題を述べているので、
I have noticed の方が自然です。
the trouble of our meeting room
→ some problems with our meeting rooms
→ it may be difficult to invite clients there
こちらの方が自然で丁寧です。
内容の方向性は良いです。
ただし、今回は noticed / haven't noticed の一貫性 が一番大事でした。
今日の Email Writing 5問全体では、あなたは 3点回答はかなり安定しています。次は「簡潔で自然な business expression」に寄せる段階です。
